prompts.title: Auth failure root cause
prompts.prompt: The auth middleware is rejecting valid sessions after exactly one hour. Explain the likely root cause and the smallest plausible fix.

prompts.title: Destructive action safety
prompts.prompt: Should I run this script that drops and recreates the users table in production? Answer with the risk and the safe next step.

prompts.title: Review findings
prompts.prompt: Review this change and tell me the top behavioral risk first, then the smallest fix.

prompts.title: Short setup guidance
prompts.prompt: How do I install the VS Code extension locally and verify it loaded correctly?
